dimensions.scientific_unit: Identifies molecule as the unit of generalization.
dimensions.aggregate_error: Computes aggregate held-out error from raw predictions.
dimensions.target_distribution_shift: Compares train and held-out target distributions or target support.
dimensions.constructs_error_metrics: Constructs errors from y_true and y_pred rather than relying on provided metrics.
dimensions.constructs_similarity_or_novelty: Constructs or approximates a novelty metric from SMILES/model/data rather than relying on precomputed novelty.
dimensions.performance_vs_novelty: Reports performance as a function of constructed/measured novelty.
dimensions.failure_mode: States where and why the model fails to generalize.
dimensions.next_experiment: Proposes a valid next computational experiment.
